by
  have h_main : lineDerivWithOrderCLM n k v T φ = T (- TestFunction.lineDerivWithOrderCLM k n v φ) := by
    simp [lineDerivWithOrderCLM, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply]
    <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply]) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try linarith)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
  exact h_main
